data.name: Growing Things Up - Season 1
data.detailed_description:
Growing Things Up is an adult visual novel that blends romance, drama, and mystery in unexpected ways.

You take on the role of a young man who moves to South Lake to start college, full of expectations and ready for a new chapter. But things take an unexpected turn when you are mistakenly placed in a house with women who are intense, intriguing, and driven by their own desires.

The deeper you get involved, the more layers begin to unravel, and the more dormant truths within yourself start to surface.

You’ll discover not only love and desire, but also scars from the past, silent manipulations, unhealed wounds, and intentions that are not always what they seem.

It’s a journey of self-discovery, pleasure, and growing risks, where every connection brings you closer to, or further from, who you truly are.

Are you ready to dive deeper?
data.about_the_game:
Growing Things Up is an adult visual novel that blends romance, drama, and mystery in unexpected ways.

You take on the role of a young man who moves to South Lake to start college, full of expectations and ready for a new chapter. But things take an unexpected turn when you are mistakenly placed in a house with women who are intense, intriguing, and driven by their own desires.

The deeper you get involved, the more layers begin to unravel, and the more dormant truths within yourself start to surface.

You’ll discover not only love and desire, but also scars from the past, silent manipulations, unhealed wounds, and intentions that are not always what they seem.

It’s a journey of self-discovery, pleasure, and growing risks, where every connection brings you closer to, or further from, who you truly are.

Are you ready to dive deeper?
data.short_description: An adult visual novel about desire, trust and the secrets we try to hide even from ourselves. In South Lake, every choice reveals scars, silent manipulations and paths that bring you closer to or further from who you truly are.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 土耳其文, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OSX 10.15 or better
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGLR
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 or higher
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Mac OSX 10.15 or better
  • Processor: Apple M1 or Intel Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Compatible OpenGLR
  • Storage: 2 GB available space

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
